questions.text: The determinant of a 2×2 matrix [[a,b],[c,d]] is:
questions.explanation: For a 2×2 matrix A = [[a,b],[c,d]], |A| = ad - bc

questions.text: If any two rows of a determinant are interchanged, the value:
questions.explanation: If any two rows (or columns) of a determinant are interchanged, the value of the determinant changes sign.

questions.text: The area of a triangle with vertices (x1,y1), (x2,y2), (x3,y3) is given by ________.
questions.explanation: Area of triangle = (1/2)|x1(y2-y3) + x2(y3-y1) + x3(y1-y2)| which can be written using determinant form.

questions.text: What is the minor of an element in a determinant?
questions.correctAnswer: The determinant obtained by deleting the row and column containing that element.
questions.explanation: The minor Mij of element aij is the determinant obtained by deleting the i-th row and j-th column.
